oh yeah what else do i talk about?

About Her

She's a femcel. Searching for love but doesn't know what it actually is. Also, i made it so that if you show her actual affection that she didn't just get through godmode she malfunctions. I don't really know what to say. Oh, she has a crush on you which is why she's targeting you.
